name: Sauteed Cabbage & Leeks
recipeIngredient: 3 leeks, white parts alone, cleaned and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil over medium heat in a skillet until hot.
2. Add the cabbage and leeks to the skillet and sauté until just about tender, about 5 to 7 minutes.
3. Stir in the thyme and continue to sauté until the cabbage and leeks are completely tender. This should take only an additional 1 minute or so. Be careful not to overcook. Serve immediately.
